code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of triples about a celestial body into a single fluent sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Mapping from predicate to a readable phrase template
    phrase_map = {
        "apoapsis": "{s} has an apoapsis of {o}",
        "discoverer": "{s} was discovered by {o}",
        "epoch": "{s} has an epoch of {o}",
        "orbitalPeriod": "{s} has an orbital period of {o}",
        "periapsis": "{s} has a periapsis of {o}",
        "averageSpeed": "{s} has an average speed of {o}",
        "escapeVelocity": "{s} has an escape velocity of {o}",
        "mass": "{s} has a mass of {o}",
        "temperature": "{s} has a temperature of {o}",
        "density": "{s} has a density of {o}",
        "rotationPeriod": "{s} has a rotation period of {o}",
        "maximumTemperature": "{s} has a maximum temperature of {o}",
        "meanTemperature": "{s} has a mean temperature of {o}",
        "minimumTemperature": "{s} has a minimum temperature of {o}",
        "formerName": "{s} was formerly known as {o}",
        "absoluteMagnitude": "{s} has an absolute magnitude of {o}",
        "discovered": "{s} was discovered on {o}",
        "surfaceArea": "{s} has a surface area of {o}",
        "deathCause": "{s} died of {o}",
        "deathPlace": "{s} died in {o}",
        "nationality": "{s} was {o}",
        "stateOfOrigin": "{s} originated from {o}",
        "almaMater": "{s} studied at {o}",
        "birthPlace": "{s} was born in {o}",
        "doctoralStudent": "{s} supervised {o}",
        "deathDate": "{s} died on {o}",
        "birthDate": "{s} was born on {o}",
    }

    def make_phrase(triple: Triple) -> str:
        tmpl = phrase_map.get(triple.predicate, "{s} {p} {o}")
        return tmpl.format(s=triple.subject, p=triple.predicate, o=triple.object)

    # Build phrases for all triples
    phrases = [make_phrase(t) for t in triples]

    # Combine into a single sentence
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        sentence = phrases[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."

    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
